chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْمُتَمَتِّعِ يَنْسَى أَنْ يُقَصِّرَ حَتَّى يُهِلَّ بِالْحَجِّ أَوْ يَحْلِقَ رَأْسَهُ أَوْ يَقَعَ أَهْلَهُ قَبْلَ أَنْ يُقَصِّرَ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 147 – The performer of Tumatto forgets to shorten (hair, nails etc.) until he begins with the Hajj, or he shaves off his head, or he falls upon his wife before he shortens (hair, nails, etc.)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/83)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/83)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنْ مُتَمَتِّعٍ وَقَعَ عَلَى امْرَأَتِهِ وَ لَمْ يُقَصِّرْ فَقَالَ يَنْحَرُ جَزُوراً وَ قَدْ خِفْتُ أَنْ يَكُونَ قَدْ ثُلِمَ حَجُّهُ إِنْ كَانَ عَالِماً وَ إِنْ كَانَ جَاهِلًا فَلَا شَيْ‏ءَ عَلَيْهِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Muawiya Bin Ammar who said,

‘I asked Abu Abdullahasws about the performer of Tumatto falling upon his wife, and he had not shortened (hair, nails, etc.). So heasws said: ‘He should sacrifice a camel, and Iasws am fearful that he has broken his Hajj if he was knowledgeable (of it), but if he did not know, so there is nothing upon him’.
en.sarwar: 5. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Mu‘awiyah ibn ‘Ammar who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about a man who is for al-Hajj al-Tamattu‘ (advantageous) and performs sexual intercourse with his wife before Taqsir (cutting some hair or finger nails and so on). He (the Imam) said, ‘He must slaughter one Jazur and I fear for his al-Hajj to have become damaged if he did knowingly; but if he is ignorant, he is not obligated for anything in this matter.’”
